description: Perform multi-stage quality review of the translation. Three passes: (1) Accuracy - verify meaning is preserved correctly from English to Uzbek, (2) Fluency - ensure natural Uzbek language flow, (3) Consistency - verify terminology is consistent throughout the entire book. Fix any issues found during each pass.
steps: Create a review script at /projects/sandbox/gg/review_translation.py that performs automated checks
Pass 1 - Accuracy: Compare each Uzbek chapter against its English source. Verify key concepts, instructions, and examples are accurately conveyed. Fix any mistranslations or omissions.
Pass 2 - Fluency: Read through the Uzbek text checking for awkward phrasing, unnatural sentence structures, or word-for-word translations that don't sound natural in Uzbek. Improve where needed.

Pass 3 - Consistency: Check that chess terminology is used consistently throughout (Shoh, Farzin, Tura, Fil, Ot, Piyoda, etc.). Verify section headers are translated consistently. Fix any inconsistencies.
Document all changes made during review in a review_notes.txt file
Save the final reviewed translations back to chapters_uz/ (overwriting previous versions)
acceptance_criteria: Terminology is consistent across all chapters
Translation reads naturally without awkward constructions
No meaning is lost or distorted from the original
verification: Run the review script and confirm no critical issues remain
Spot-check at least 3 chapters for natural Uzbek flow
